strategy: He resists 40% to every school, so bring pierce or shatter and hit with your strongest school under blades.
While Sylvia is with him he casts a -100% Virulent Plague on the team every round, gutting your damage. Cleanse it before your big hit, or hit the same round it lands.
Kill Sylvia before she casts Dark Pact (she sacrifices herself to give Malistaire a +100% Balanceblade). Once he is alone he Mana Burns the team but stops the Plague.
Avoid casting charms while he has a minion, he answers with Jinn's Larceny to steal them. Skip DoTs too, Sylvia removes them with Mass Triage.
Stack blades on one round, cleanse the Plague, and land a single pierced burst.
cheatNotes: Turn order randomly switches, so you cannot count on going first, plan for either order.
Join late and he interrupt-casts Fire Dragon on you.
While Sylvia is alive he hits the whole team with a -100% Virulent Plague every round, cleanse it or hit the same turn it lands.
Cast a charm while he has a minion and he steals it with Jinn's Larceny, hold charms until Sylvia is dead.
The charm-steal only fires when he has a minion, so it is safe once he is alone.
Alone without Sylvia he cuts 25% of his own health and Mana Burns the team, removing a shadow pip.
He summons Sylvia Drake with a Shadow spell and Chokes the whole team.
Cast a DoT and Sylvia answers with Shadow Mass Triage, wiping your DoTs, use burst instead.
After a few rounds Sylvia Dark Pacts, sacrificing herself to give Malistaire a +100% Balanceblade, kill her before this to deny the huge buff.
